message:
refactor(interactive): extract /tree navigation UI into dedicated tree submodule

Move ~575 lines of tree-related types and logic out of the monolithic
interactive.rs into the new src/interactive/tree.rs submodule. This includes:

Types extracted:
- TreeUiState, TreeSelectorState, TreeSelectorRow — selector widget state
- TreeSummaryPromptState, TreeCustomPromptState — summary flow state
- TreeSummaryChoice — enum with NoSummary/Summarize/SummarizeWithCustomPrompt
- PendingTreeNavigation — carries context between tree selection and summary

Functions extracted:
- resolve_tree_selector_initial_id() — parses /tree arguments (index, ID,
  prefix match) into an initial selector position
- collect_tree_branch_entries() — walks the session DAG from old leaf to
  common ancestor, collecting entries for optional summarization
- build_tree_selector_rows() — builds the display tree from session entries
  with user-only/show-all filtering, label annotations, and branch markers

The interactive.rs module now declares `mod tree` and re-imports these items,
keeping the public API unchanged. No behavioral changes — pure extraction
to reduce file size and improve navigability.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
